name: M MEDLER Bag
description: Medler's Duffle bag is strong from inside with a fashionable outside! Made of nylon and the strolley pattern makes this bag stylish and easy to carry The corner guards of the bags support from falling or slipping. It helps in holding your belongings sturdily and avoids any damage to the bag while traveling. Along with the pull strings of the bag, below are the trolley wheels attached to drag your bag while traveling by any means of transport. Medler's duffle bag is designed to be sturdy and has long durability with being water-resistant.This is an ideal bag for those who are travel buffs and like to go rustic with their journey. Along with its stylish look, it is also waterproof which reduces every traveler's worry.

name: LED Writing Board
description: Introducing the Glowrite LED Writing Board with USB Stand/Base ✨, a versatile and innovative addition to any home or office space. This sleek and modern writing board comes with a convenient USB stand/base, featuring a twin color piano black finish 🎹, adding a touch of elegance to your workspace. Proudly made in India 🇮🇳, the Glowrite LED Writing Board showcases quality craftsmanship and attention to detail, ensuring long-lasting durability and reliability. Available in six variants, one of which allows customization, enabling you to add your name for a personalized touch ✍️. Whether you're jotting down notes, creating colorful artwork, or displaying important messages, the Glowrite LED Writing Board is the perfect tool for all your needs. Its vibrant LED lights, available in warm white color, illuminate your writing or artwork, ensuring maximum visibility and impact 💡. Acrylic board measuring 24 x 16 cm and 4mm thick (Best in Class) Illuminate your ideas and bring your messages to life with the Glowrite LED Writing Board. Order yours today and experience the convenience and versatility of this must-have productivity tool. 🚀.

name: Lymio Shirt for Men
description: Step up your everyday style with this premium-quality men’s shirt from J B Fashion, designed for comfort, durability, and elegance. Made in India with precision craftsmanship, this shirt features a modern slim-fit cut and lightweight fabric that keeps you comfortable all day long. Measuring 10 × 2 × 11 cm and weighing just 299 g, it’s easy to carry and maintain. The shirt’s classic khaki tone makes it versatile for both casual and semi-formal occasions. Each pack contains 1 shirt and is covered under the brand’s warranty and quality assurance. With a strong customer response, this product proudly ranks among the Top #372 in Clothing & Accessories on Amazon India.

name: TAGDO Men's Loose Fit
description: For a relaxed weekend look, pair those sneakers with casual pants and a loose-fitting shirt. Men's casual pants are typically designed for comfort and versatility in everyday settings. These pants are characterized by their relaxed fit, often featuring straight or tapered legs. They are usually made from lightweight and breathable fabrics such as cotton or blends, ensuring comfort throughout the day.

name: Lymio Hoodie
description: This premium unisex sweatshirt from J B Fashion combines comfort, style, and durability for everyday wear. Made in India with precision craftsmanship, it features a modern fit suitable for both men and women, ensuring a cozy and trendy look. With compact dimensions of 10 × 2 × 11 cm and a lightweight build of 399 g, it is easy to wear, pack, and maintain, making it perfect for daily use or travel. Manufactured and distributed by J B Fashion, Surat – 395004, this sweatshirt undergoes strict quality checks to ensure long-lasting color and fabric quality. Ranked #329 in Clothing & Accessories on Amazon India, it offers the perfect balance of warmth, versatility, and fashion appeal for all seasons.

name: Campus Men Sneakers
description: Max out your style quotient with The Campus OG-27 Men's Sneaker Shoes. Make your everyday outings extra happening with the coolest sneakers on your feet. Displaying sleek and modern looks, these sneakers are perfect for every affair. The PU material of the upper keeps your feet safe from splashes and dirt, while the Yoga Max insole keeps your stride bouncy and comfy! The Anti-Slip outsole design further enhances your grip, preventing accidental slips and keeping your feet ready for all the fun! Pairing striking shades of bottle green, black, and bright white, these sneakers elevate your outfits and turn heads effortlessly!

name: Dining Table Cover
description: Wings Star Dining Table Cover for 4 Seater, 40 x 60 inch Size, Waterproof and Dustproof Table Sheet,Dining Table 4 Seater Waterproof Cover (Brown, 40 x 60 inch (Rectangular))

name: Chinese Collor Straight Kurta
description: Zombom Combo of Men's Solid Cotton Polyester Blend Full Sleeve Mandarin/Chinese Collor Straight Kurta (Pack of 4)

name: Puma Running Shoe
description: Puma Unisex-Adult Flexfocus Lite Modern Running Shoe

name: Square Cricket Shoe
description: The Puma Cricket Square Cricket Shoes are specially designed for cricket players, offering comfort, grip, and stability during practice and matches. Made with synthetic material and Ethylene Vinyl Acetate (EVA) construction, these shoes are lightweight, durable, and comfortable for long use. They feature a lace-up closure, flat heel, and rubber sole for a secure fit and better traction on the ground. With a stylish White-Blue Glimmer-Elektro Green color combination, these cricket shoes provide both performance and sporty looks, making them a reliable choice for regular cricket activity.

name: Drogo M Running Shoe
description: The Adidas Running Shoes are designed for comfort, support, and performance during daily running and sports activities. Made with synthetic and mesh material along with Ethylene Vinyl Acetate (EVA), these shoes are lightweight, breathable, and comfortable for regular use. They feature a lace-up closure, no heel design, and EVA sole for a secure fit and better cushioning. With a regular ankle height and sporty style, these running shoes are a reliable choice for active wear and everyday performance.

name: Seawalk Sneaker
description: The Puma Seawalk IDP Casual Shoes are stylish and comfortable sneakers designed for everyday casual wear. Made with textile material and a durable rubber sole, these shoes provide comfort, flexibility, and reliable grip for daily use. They feature a lace-up closure, flat heel design, and a sleek Black-Quarry color combination that gives them a modern and sporty look. Easy to maintain with a simple dry cloth wipe, these sneakers are a practical and fashionable choice for regular wear.

name: Galaxis Pro Running Shoe
description: The Puma Galaxis Pro Running Shoes are designed for comfort, support, and performance during running activities. Made with textile material and a durable rubber sole, these shoes offer lightweight comfort, flexibility, and good grip for regular use. They feature a lace-up closure, flat heel design, and a stylish Gray Echo-PUMA White-Orange Glo color combination that gives them a sporty and modern look. Built for running, these shoes are a reliable choice for those seeking both performance and everyday comfort.

name: Smashic Sneaker
description: The Puma Smashic Sneakers are designed for everyday comfort, style, and regular casual use. Made with synthetic material and a durable rubber sole, these shoes offer long-lasting comfort, flexibility, and reliable grip for daily wear. They feature a lace-up closure, flat heel design, and a clean White-Matte Silver color combination that gives them a sleek and modern look. Built for basic everyday activity, these sneakers are a stylish and practical choice for casual wear.

name: Timer Clock
description: The SADRUCHI Timer Clock is a compact and multifunctional digital timer designed to help users stay punctual and focused during study, sports, cooking, or daily tasks. Made from durable plastic with a large 5.5 cm LCD display, it offers clear visibility and easy operation with 3-in-1 functions including clock, stopwatch, and timer modes. It features two alert modes—silent mode with flash light only and ring mode with loud beeping alarm plus flash light—making it suitable for different situations. With a tabletop stand, magnetic back, and easy mode switching, this multicolored timer clock is a practical and useful tool for students, athletes, and anyone managing time effectively.

name: Study Table Desk Lamp
description: The LED Reading Lamp with Desk Organizer is a practical and stylish study lamp designed to provide comfortable lighting and better workspace organization. Made with a durable plastic base and shade, it features eye-caring LED technology with three color modes—White, Warm, and Warm White—along with adjustable brightness levels for reading, studying, working, or relaxing. Its flexible adjustable neck allows easy direction control, while the built-in pen and phone holders help keep the desk neat and organized. With USB rechargeable support, touch switch control, and 1.5 to 2 hours of runtime on full brightness, this lamp is a convenient and useful choice for daily study and work use.

name: LCD Writing Pad
description: The Portronics RuffPad 8.5E LCD Writing Tablet is a lightweight and reusable digital writing pad designed for writing, drawing, doodling, and note-taking for both kids and adults. It features an 8.5-inch anti-glare, glare-free LCD screen with pressure-sensitive technology that allows users to create thick and thin lines based on stylus pressure. With its one-button erase function, anti-erase lock feature, and the ability to rewrite over 100,000 times, it is an eco-friendly alternative to paper and pencils. Safe, non-toxic, and easy to use, the RuffPad 8.5E is ideal for students, office use, creative work, and everyday learning or entertainment.

name: YOUVA Case Bound Magnetic My Notes
description: The YOUVA Hardcover Journal with Magnetic Flap is a stylish and practical notebook designed for writing, note-taking, and daily journaling. It features a sturdy hardcover with a magnetic flap closure that keeps the book securely closed and prevents pages from becoming loose. With a convenient A5 size, 192 pages, matte finish cover, and attractive trendy designs with spot UV effect, it offers both durability and a modern executive look. The journal also includes good quality paper and a bookmark ribbon, making it a useful and eco-friendly choice for students, professionals, and all age groups.

name: Book with Clip Holder with Pen for Gifting
description: It is a diary style desk organizer,memo note pad with a closed size of 7.5 X 4.5 inch appox It has 3 sizes of sticky note pad & 1 pad of loose sheets with clip holder and a pen No. of sheets in sticky note pad of yellow(appox size 4 x 3 inch ) ,pink(appox size 3 x 2 inch ) are 50 approx No. of small strips / flags (size 2 x .5 inch ) are 20 approx.Each color and no.of loose sheets( size 7 x 4 inch ) are 50 apprx and the colored small stripes/flags will be arranged randomly Colored stripes and pen design is indicative and might show slight variations

name: 3 in 1 Diary with Pen and Wooden Lifetime Calendar
description: The Giftana Wooden Gift Set is a premium and elegant gift combo designed for both personal and professional gifting. This beautifully boxed set includes a wooden diary, a premium wooden metal pen, and a wooden lifetime calendar desk, making it a stylish and useful choice for daily writing and desk organization. The diary features an eco-friendly wooden cover with 160 pages of 80 GSM ivory paper, while the reusable wooden calendar offers long-lasting functionality with a timeless handcrafted design. Perfect for birthdays, festivals, corporate gifting, and special occasions, this modern brown-themed set is a thoughtful and practical gift suitable for all age groups and loved ones.

name: Philips 2100-Watt Induction Cooktop
description: The Philips HD4928/01 Induction Cooktop is a modern and efficient cooking appliance designed to make daily cooking faster, easier, and more convenient. Powered by advanced electromagnetic induction technology, it delivers high heating efficiency, cooks food quicker than a traditional gas stove, and helps retain nutrients by reducing vitamin loss during cooking. With a powerful 2100W performance, touch start operation, 0–3 hours timer setting, and 5 preset menus specially programmed for Indian cooking needs, it offers a smooth and user-friendly cooking experience. Its Smart Sense technology also detects suitable vessels for safe and efficient use, making it a practical choice for modern kitchens.

name: Rico BIS-ISI Certified induction stove
description: The Rico Induction Cooktop is a compact and efficient electric cooking appliance designed for fast, safe, and convenient everyday cooking. It features superfast heating technology that helps prepare meals quickly while saving time and energy. Built with a high-grade ceramic glass surface, it offers durability, heat resistance, and easy cleaning for regular kitchen use. With multiple cooking functions such as soup, fry, steam, and other Indian cooking modes, along with an LED digital display, portable design, and smart safety features like auto vessel detection, timer with auto shut-off, and shockproof body, this induction cooktop is a practical choice for homes, hostels, and travel.

name: Cadlec CookMate 2000W Induction Cooktop
description: The CADLEC Induction Cooktop is a powerful and efficient electric cooking appliance designed for fast, safe, and convenient everyday cooking. With 2000W high-power performance, it provides quick heating and energy-efficient operation, making it ideal for modern kitchens, small spaces, offices, and portable use. Built with a durable ABS plastic body, this induction stove is shock-proof, rust-proof, and designed for long-lasting safety and reliability. It also features an LED digital display, adjustable temperature control, automatic shut-off, and smart preset cooking functions for Indian dishes like chapati and dosa, making it a practical and user-friendly choice for daily cooking

name: WishCare Tinted Lip Balm
description: The WishCare Ceramide Lip Balm SPF 50 PA+++ is a nourishing and protective lip care product designed to keep lips soft, moisturized, and shielded from sun damage. Enriched with broad-spectrum SPF 50 and PA+++ protection, it helps protect lips from harmful UVA and UVB rays, while ceramides lock in moisture and support healthy lips. Infused with Kojic Acid and Niacinamide, it helps lighten and brighten pigmented lips caused by sun exposure, pollution, or daily stress. With a natural pink tint, non-sticky texture, and ingredients like shea butter and cocoa butter, this cruelty-free, paraben-free, vegan lip balm offers smooth application, long-lasting hydration, and everyday lip repair.

name: Super Bright Sunscreen
description: The DOT & KEY Vitamin C + E Super Bright Sunscreen SPF 50 PA+++ is a lightweight and effective skincare product designed to protect the skin from harmful sun damage while enhancing glow and radiance. With broad-spectrum SPF 50 and PA+++ protection, it helps prevent tanning and shields the skin from UVA, UVB, and blue light rays during both indoor and outdoor use. Enriched with Triple Vitamin C, Vitamin E, and Sicilian Blood Orange, it helps fight dullness, pigmentation, and early signs of aging while supporting brighter and healthier-looking skin. Its water-light, non-sticky, fragrance-free formula provides zero white cast, making it suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

name: Hyphen Brightening Lip Balm for Dark Lips
description: The Hyphen Peachy Nude Lip Balm is a glossy and nourishing tinted lip balm designed to provide hydration, softness, and a natural peachy nude finish. It offers up to 24-hour moisture lock while helping to repair the lip moisture barrier with the goodness of Linoleic Acid. Enriched with peptides, this non-sticky formula helps visibly plump and smooth the lips for a healthier and fuller look. With its paraben-free formula and buildable tint, this lip balm is a convenient all-in-one product for daily moisturization, brightening, and soft lip care.
